errors.message: GitHub returned a primary REST API rate-limit response.
errors.hint: Wait until the x-ratelimit-reset time or use a browser-supplied GitHub token with higher quota.

errors.message: GitHub returned a secondary rate-limit or abuse-detection response.
errors.hint: Slow down requests and wait for retry-after when GitHub supplies it.

errors.message: The repository was not found or cannot be read by the current token.
errors.hint: Check the owner/repository input. For private repositories, use a token that can read the repository.
Remove the token or use a valid fine-grained read-only token.

errors.message: GitHub Pages returned a static 404 page for an unknown GRA URL.
errors.hint: Use the sitemap, llms.txt, or developer docs to find supported static resources.
